title: Catamaran Charter Wedding in Puerto Banus: Costs & Tips 2026
html:
If you are planning a catamaran charter wedding in Puerto Banus, expect to pay from EUR 4,000 for a full-day celebration aboard a 50-foot vessel. Depart from the glamorous Puerto Banus marina in Marbella and you can host up to 20 guests on the Mediterranean Sea. To compare prices and book, you can hire a boat through BoatHire24, a worldwide marketplace that connects renters with verified owners.

How much does a catamaran charter wedding in Puerto Banus cost in 2026?

Wedding catamaran charters in Puerto Banus start at EUR 3,500 for a half-day and can exceed EUR 8,000 for a full-day luxury package. The price includes the boat, crew, and basic amenities. Additional costs such as catering, decorations, and a photographer will increase the total. For full-day catamaran hire, a typical wedding group of 20 people pays around EUR 5,000 including a three-course meal and an open bar for three hours. You can hire a boat in a few minutes.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

Your wedding charter will most likely depart from Puerto Banus marina itself, but nearby alternatives exist. The main options are:

  • Puerto Banus marina, the iconic port with luxury shops and a dedicated charter dock
  • Puerto Jose Banus, the sister marina adjacent to the main harbour
  • Cabopino, a smaller, quieter marina 8 km east, ideal for a more intimate start
  • Marbella port, 6 km away, with plenty of parking and easy access for guests
  • San Pedro de Alcantara, a local fishing port 3 km west, offering a low-key vibe

Which boat to rent for your wedding

  1. Sanyati Leopard 51ft, a modern catamaran ideal for wedding ceremonies with a large flybridge; accommodates 20 guests; from EUR 4,500 half-day. One popular option is this catamaran listed on BoatHire24.
  2. Lagoon 52, a spacious sailing catamaran with a wide deck for a seated dinner; fits 22 guests; from EUR 5,000 full-day
  3. Azimut 72, a sleek motor yacht with a large aft deck for a reception; sleeps 8 overnight; from EUR 6,500 full-day
  4. Sunseeker Predator 68, a sporty motor yacht with a sundeck perfect for photos; capacity 18 guests; from EUR 7,000 full-day

Cost breakdown for a catamaran wedding charter

  • Shared tour: EUR 120 per person for a 4-hour sunset cruise, not private
  • Small motorboat half-day: EUR 1,500 for a 30-footer, ideal for an intimate civil ceremony for 6
  • Catamaran full-day: EUR 4,000, 6,000 for a 50, 55 ft catamaran for up to 24 guests, including crew and fuel
  • Luxury crewed yacht full-day: EUR 8,000, 12,000 for a Sunseeker 80+ ft with captain, steward, and full catering

When to book and do you need a licence?

The best wedding charter season in Puerto Banus runs from May to September, when sea breezes from the Poniente wind keep temperatures comfortable. A blockquote here: “In July and August, book at least three months ahead to secure your preferred catamaran; weekends fill quickly for wedding parties.” For licence requirements: if you plan to skipper the boat yourself, you need a valid ICC or equivalent. Most wedding charters include a licensed captain, so no licence is needed by the bride and groom. Always confirm exact requirements with the operator.

If you want a wedding sunset cruise, consider the period from 19:00 to 22:00 in July; the light is golden and the sea is often calm in Puerto Banus bay.

At a glance

  • Price range: EUR 1,500 to EUR 12,000 for a private wedding charter
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: 4 to 8 hours typical
  • Guest capacity: up to 24 on a standard catamaran, larger yachts hold 30+
  • Currency: EUR
  • Distance from port: 5 nautical miles to Cabopino, 12 nautical miles to Gibraltar Strait sighting

Questions about catamaran wedding charter in Puerto Banus

Can we have a wedding ceremony on a catamaran in Puerto Banus?

Yes, many catamarans are licensed for civil ceremonies, with the captain officiating, but you must arrange paperwork with Marbella town hall.

What is included in a typical wedding charter price?

Most quotes include the boat hire, crew, fuel, and basic amenities such as a sound system and safety equipment, but food and drinks are extra.

How many guests can a catamaran hold for a wedding in Puerto Banus?

A 50-foot catamaran typically carries up to 24 guests for a standing event, while a 60-foot yacht can seat 30 for a dinner.

Do we need to provide our own decorations for the wedding charter?

Most charter companies allow you to bring your own decorations, but some offer packages with flowers, linens, and lighting for an additional fee.

Chartering a catamaran for your wedding in Puerto Banus offers a unique and memorable experience on the Mediterranean. BoatHire24 makes it simple to compare options and book directly. If you own a boat in this area, you can list a boat for free and reach couples planning their dream day.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
